en.ahmedali: He is the forgiving and the loving,
en.ahmedraza: And He only is the Oft Forgiving, the Beloved of His bondmen.
en.arberry: and He is the All-forgiving, the All-loving,
en.daryabadi: And He is the Fogiving, the Loving,
en.hilali: And He is Oft-Forgiving, full of love (towards the pious who are real true believers of Islamic Monotheism),
en.itani: And He is the Forgiving, the Loving.
en.maududi: and He is the Ever Forgiving, the Most Loving
en.pickthall: And He is the Forgiving, the Loving,
en.qarai: and He is the All-forgiving, the All-affectionate,
en.qaribullah: And He is the Forgiving, and the Loving.
en.sahih: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
en.sarwar: He is the All-forgiving, the Most Loving One,
en.shakir: And He is the Forgiving, the Loving,
en.wahiduddin: and He is the Forgiving and Loving One.
en.yusufali: And He is the Oft-Forgiving, Full of Loving-Kindness,
fa.ansarian: و او بسیار آمرزنده و دوستدار [مؤمنان] است.
fa.ghomshei: و هم او بسیار آمرزنده و دوستدار مؤمنان است.
fa.khorramdel: خدا آمرزگار و دوستدار (بندگان مؤمن) است. [[«الْوَدُودُ»: بسیار دوستدار و بامحبّت و مودّت.]]
fa.makarem: و او آمرزنده و دوستدار (مؤمنان) است،
fa.sadeqi: و اوست بس پوشنده‌ی (گناهان و نقصان‌ها و) بسی دوستدار (مؤمنان).
